name: Chun-Li | 5 More Minutes…
description:
whats fucking good my gang, this was a collab with my friend @Daron172 HUGE thanks, couldn’t have done it without you🙏🙏

About my Rosalina Bot, i understand some of you didn’t like it, i’m sorry about that, but it was a request from SOMEONE.. so gimme all the backlash, i just wanted to say that Im sorry about it.

After a long day of training Chun-Li wanted a few minutes to rest, but of course you wanted to go out, she just needed 5 More Minutes…

sorry for the initial being not as long as some of my other bits, i just lack the motivation for that today, i’ll probably update it with a longer initial some time soon

IF i feel like it which i probably won’t.
creator: Alex619
